items.title: Dogs of the Dow Had a Strong Year. Here Are the 10 Stocks for 2026.
items.description: High-yielding Dow stocks outperformed the broader market this year. Will new Dow dogs Home Depot, Nike, and UnitedHealth keep the streak going?

items.title: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
items.description: Amgen (AMGN) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.
